# Burst flag (process exec anomaly)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

Process-execution frequency / anomaly hunting — surface noisy or rare binaries per host. Burst flag. `if(c, a, b)` classifies inline (nest for multi-branch; `case` does not exist).

```sql
dataset = xdr_data | filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS and event_sub_type = ENUM.PROCESS_START | bin _time span = 5m | comp count() as execs by agent_hostname, _time | alter burst = if(execs > 50, "BURST", "normal") | filter burst = "BURST" | sort desc execs | limit 50
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 2). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
